title: Production readiness checklist
scope: go-live, deployment pipeline change, domain change, provider launch, or production-risk change

items.evidenceRequired: API contract, body validation, schema migration, and production config offline readiness passed.
Full machine-readable evidence report exists and is ok=true.
Public or target runtime health gate passed.
Domain, HTTPS, headers, and edge expectations passed.
Webhook, claim, recovery, and delivery regression passed.
Human explicitly approved go-live, rollback, irreversible data action, or provider launch in conversation.
